name: Biden HQ
subject: Trump raised over $24 million last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194b9/1cd0ac28/10bbac28/356cf078/889602336/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter --

We don't mean to alarm you, but we have some bad news: **Donald Trump raised over $24 million -- last night** That's more in 1 day than any Democrat in this race has raised in 3 months.

That's a LOT of money. We don't expect to match that -- but we do need enough to compete.

**Our first PUBLIC fundraising deadline is at the end of the month.** We want to raise $500,000 more from our digital fundraising program.

It's going to take a lot of work to get there, but if we do, we'll have the resources we need to compete with Trump's fortunes.

So Peter, we need your help to hit our goal. This is what we have on record for you: | | Supporter: **Peter Willis**
Chipped in to support Joe Biden? ** Not Yet! **
Suggested Support: **Chip in $5**
---
**Please Peter, can you make a contribution to Joe Biden 's campaign today?**
| [**DONATE $5 >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194b9/1cd0ac28/10bbac28/356cf077/889602336/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_june2019?refcode=email-bsd-20190619trumpdayone-b3_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190619trumpdayone&utm_content=b3_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [**DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN ->**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194b9/1cd0ac28/10bbac28/356cf06b/889602336/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194b9/1cd0ac28/10bbac28/356cf06d/889602336/VEsHAw/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-email"). We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Hidin’ Joe Biden
body:
Hidin' Joe Biden No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Hidin' Joe Biden](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden is clearly the frontrunner at this time to win the Democratic nomination for president. He's way ahead in virtually all the polls. But where exactly IS Joe Biden?

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Faux Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats in Congress have a big problem. Their base, the people who are hardcore Democrats, and vote Democrat every election come hell or highwater, hate Donald Trump, and want him impeached. Most of the rest of America, meaning virtually all Republicans, and the majority of independents, are sick of talking about it, and think it's a big waste of time and money. So what are Democrats to do?

Click the link below to read this week's blog about it. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Why China MUST Be Defeated](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-u/)
I read a column by Dick Morris over the weekend which I have to say was one of the most insightful and best written I've read in a long time. In my blog this week I'm going to sum up his key points for you

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Why We Can't Trust the Democrats](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats, mostly those running for President this time around, are saying things which ought to give voters cause to be concerned about just how far to the left they are veering. I'm on the blog discussing it today.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidtuikl-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Tim
subject: My team tells me there's still two tickets up for grabs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Team,

I'm fired up and ready to debate the issues that matter to Americans: jobs, inequality, health care, pensions -- the real bread and butter issues our families and communities care about.

Before that though, I want to reiterate some really exciting news: we have [_**two tickets for flights to Miami and two tickets to the debate**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-miami?refcode=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190619_3_5_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+two+tickets+for+flights+to+Miami+and+two&utm_campaign=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190619_3_5_T2&source=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190619_3_5_T2"). We don't want to extend the offer to just anyone, team -- that's why we are reaching out only to a select group of dedicated supporters like you.

All you have to do to enter is complete this form and consider donating any amount -- even as little as $3. [_**But be sure to enter soon, because the contest closes today.**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-miami?refcode=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190619_3_5_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+But+be+sure+to+enter+soon+because+the+co&utm_campaign=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190619_3_5_T2&source=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190619_3_5_T2")

I hope to see you there!

Tim

Winner will be selected by random drawing from all eligible entries to be held on or about 06/20/2019. The prize may be forfeited and awarded to an alternate eligible winner if two attempts to contact the winner by phone or email are not successful. Odds depend on the number of entries received. subject: Sign are in high demand
body:
We need your help

| Dear Friend,
I emailed you Friday ... but our yard signs and 4x8 signs are in high demand.
There is no doubt our momentum is stronger than ever. This momentum we are seeing is because of people like you - and the fact that I am giving Mississippians an alternative to another career politician.
As you know, we don't have the big lobbyist and special interest money. That is why I am reaching out to our supporters again.
So, any donation this week will allow us to print more yard and 4x8 signs to be distributed around the state in preparation for August.
Please help us get more signs up and keep the momentum going by [making a donation today!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O44Bll3GspA-7kKX6KDZNobuQWF4naPy_SrOWHwNd5SPG5IeXhsEAwP59vg-m0F85DymuOkIhzg-soIFmBLo4S3kDkUfGqK1S6-JMMqSTIFl0SJUqjwu4vsygCBOB-RLdQfQ23dq0TBY2sFnaiZtlpIGMdBugAPxpxnMZPDeWzuB-yrIvT_emL7ocktVJErpn4ErEShTK4e-qYHj10HT7a_G34EOAV3f&c=jjpOweyUmU-DyO9ulrccZcNPrDi_bV18X5GFcYhOB6jopfuIAc2f6w==&ch=R5IuS6ZFPzWS91TaTiVmZauVBeSERuTQCJg7Xj-uv6sKfnWwFbgBig==)

Robert

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: They are noticeably quiet
body:
| | Peter, As the media go ape over every state law that restricts abortion, they are noticeably quiet about new laws in blue states that loosen abortion restrictions to the point of endangering women’s health. Just this week Massachusetts lawmakers held a hearing on a bill that would follow in the steps of New York and Vermont allowing abortions of viable babies right up until the moment of birth for any reason. And a new abortion law in Illinois eliminates the partial-birth abortion ban, waiting periods, spousal and parental consent, and even removes licensing requirements and health and safety inspections on abortion facilities. Maine now allows abortions to be performed by people who aren’t even doctors. If this is the direction that the pro-abortion lobby wants to go, then could we at least drop the charade that they defend abortion rights in the name of “protecting women’s health”? **They serve one purpose only: promoting the widespread normalization of the killing of children, either in or out of the womb, in order to exalt the value of convenience over human life.** [This is why My Faith Votes is working tirelessly to motivate and mobilize Christians to stand for life and vote in all 100,000 elections in 2020 and why we are asking you to be part of this effort](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190620apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=1). Ohio Representative Marcia Fudge recently read a letter that attacked the President’s supporters, calling them “racists, steeped in religious beliefs, ignorant, just plain dumb.” Presidential candidate Senator Kirsten Gillibrand recently defended her promise to appoint only pro-abortion judges if elected, saying this: "I think there's some issues that have such moral clarity that we have as a society decided that the other side is not acceptable. Imagine saying that it's okay to appoint a judge who's racist or anti-Semitic or homophobic...I don't think that those are political issues anymore." So there you have it: if you don’t support the slaughtering of babies in the womb right up to (or beyond) the moment of birth, society has already deemed you the moral equivalent of a racist, anti-Semite or homophobe, unfit to hold any important public position. Thankfully we have a President who believes differently. Just recently, President Trump took bold action to protect life by announcing that the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services will no longer allow human fetal tissue obtained from elective abortions to be used in research conducted by the National Institute of Health. **The battle over abortion is the most divisive issue facing our nation because it involves life and death.** The mainstream media has proved time and time again they won’t share the truth about abortion, so it’s up to Christians to protect the most vulnerable and serve as their advocates at the polls. **My Faith Votes supporters' donations provided key technology used in the pro-life movie Unplanned that made great impact. Many were able to access abortion counseling and thousands committed to take action. We know of over 100 abortion workers who used our technology to reach out for help and leave the industry.** But we now we need your help reaching Jesus-followers to stand for life at the polls. [Please consider making your best donation today towards our pro-life voter mobilization effort. Your gift of any amount will make a lasting difference](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190620apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=2). The left is uniting on the issue of abortion and Christians must stand stronger together than ever before to protect the unborn in the womb and the sanctity of all life. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190620apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190620apl01nd&n=8)

name: Gov. Bill Weld
subject: The Trump Train Stops Here
body:
Dear Friend,
This week President Donald Trump announced his re-election campaign in Orlando, Florida. Here's what the Orlando Sentinel - a paper that endorsed Mitt Romney in 2012 - said about Donald Trump:
_After 21⁄2 years we've seen enough. Enough of the chaos, the division, the schoolyard insults, the self-aggrandizement, the corruption, and especially the lies._
_So many lies - from white lies to whoppers - told out of ignorance, laziness, recklessness, expediency or opportunity._
_We can do better. We have to do better._
I agree. [I'm running for President to restore decency and integrity to the Oval Office. ](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?utm_source=rally&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rally_email&n=1)**
This is too big to do alone. I need YOUR help.[Can you make a small contribution today? Any amount - $5/$10/$25](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?utm_source=rally&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rally_email&n=2) \- will help! **
My record? As a Reagan appointed US Attorney, I went after corrupt politicians and crooks: 110 out of 111 convictions, a record never matched.
As the first Republican governor elected in Massachusetts in 20 years, I took a state from the edge of bankruptcy and balanced the budget, cut taxes, reduced crime and always treated every citizen with respect and dignity. I won re-election with the highest margin in the history of Massachusetts, bringing Democrats, Republicans and Independents together for the common good.
[Decency, integrity, honor. Those values are lost in this White House but not in the hearts of Americans ](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?utm_source=rally&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rally_email&n=3)I want our children and grandchildren to be able to look to the White House and know it represents the best of America, not the worst.
**This is a battle worth fighting. Decency, honor and integrity are worth fighting for.[Will join me in this fight by making a contribution of $5, $10 or $25 today? ](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?utm_source=rally&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rally_email&n=4)**
The path back to decency starts in the Republican primary for president. I am standing up to Donald Trump and his assault on American values. But I need your help. _[Please consider donating to our cause today](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?utm_source=rally&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rally_email&n=5)._ I promise to spend every dollar and every minute in this campaign fighting for an America you can be proud of.
Yours for a better America,
Bill Weld

[PS: Thank you for everything you do to stand up for what is right every day. Please help me stand up for what is right for America by making a contribution today! ](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?utm_source=rally&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rally_email&n=6)

clean_body: Dear Friend, This week President Donald Trump announced his re-election campaign in Orlando, Florida. Here's what the Orlando Sentinel - a paper that endorsed Mitt Romney in 2012 - said about Donald Trump: After 21⁄2 years we've seen enough. Enough of the chaos, the division, the schoolyard insults, the self-aggrandizement, the corruption, and especially the lies. So many lies - from white lies to whoppers - told out of ignorance, laziness, recklessness, expediency or opportunity. We can do better. We have to do better. I agree. This is too big to do alone. I need YOUR help. \- will help! My record? As a Reagan appointed US Attorney, I went after corrupt politicians and crooks: 110 out of 111 convictions, a record never matched. As the first Republican governor elected in Massachusetts in 20 years, I took a state from the edge of bankruptcy and balanced the budget, cut taxes, reduced crime and always treated every citizen with respect and dignity. I won re-election with the highest margin in the history of Massachusetts, bringing Democrats, Republicans and Independents together for the common good. want our children and grandchildren to be able to look to the White House and know it represents the best of America, not the worst. This is a battle worth fighting. Decency, honor and integrity are worth fighting for. The path back to decency starts in the Republican primary for president. I am standing up to Donald Trump and his assault on American values. But I need your help. . I promise to spend every dollar and every minute in this campaign fighting for an America you can be proud of. Yours for a better America, Bill Weld Weld 2020 -=-=- Weld 2020 · United States

subject: re: healthcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7665040/72773617/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1MTdlYS03ZDkzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F9b9ePj2zsTAbn8q6A58iNduJwVkMg36Tn7mWcD2vY=)
---
Peter, We cannot wait: Texans need affordable health care now.

It seems like every day another article details the wide-reaching effects of Texas’s broken health care system.

Texas ranks last in healthcare access and affordability. Texas ranks last in percentage of children with health insurance, and it ranks last for adults, too. More Texans are going without needed care than residents of any other state, because we can’t afford it. We’re not going to the dentist, or getting cancer screenings, or receiving treatment for mental illness, and neither are our children. Pregnant Texans aren’t getting the prenatal care they need, and they’re dying because of it.

[**We need to fix this broken system. Send me to Congress and I will fight to guarantee care for all!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7665041/72773618/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1MTdlYS03ZDkzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F9b9ePj2zsTAbn8q6A58iNduJwVkMg36Tn7mWcD2vY=&refcode=em062019)

We’re living in a state of crisis, and it’s not necessary. Over and over, the research is clear: residents in states with Medicaid expansion have better health outcomes. Medicaid expansion in Texas will save the lives of countless Texans, thousands of children among them. It will make pregnancy safer for mothers and their babies. It will allow kids to go to school and parents to go to work instead of losing days to preventable illnesses. It will keep rural hospitals from being bankrupted by unpaid debts. There is no good reason for the Texas government to refuse to expand Medicaid: our federal income tax dollars are already paying to expand Medicaid nationwide. We are only missing out on the benefits, not the cost.

Of course, Medicaid expansion alone cannot fix everything that is wrong with America’s healthcare system. We need leaders who will make universal healthcare a reality, and who will push back against the ruthless profiteering of the corporate healthcare industry. No one should die because their insurance deductible was too high.

Let’s work together to end this needless crisis. **[With your help, I will make it my mission in Congress to ensure that every American has access to high-quality healthcare.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7665042/72773619/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1MTdlYS03ZDkzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F9b9ePj2zsTAbn8q6A58iNduJwVkMg36Tn7mWcD2vY=&refcode=em062019)** Equal access to health care means a chance at equal opportunity for every American, regardless of who your parents are, where you were born, or how much money is in your bank account.
| [Chip in Before June 30th! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7665043/72773620/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1MTdlYS03ZDkzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F9b9ePj2zsTAbn8q6A58iNduJwVkMg36Tn7mWcD2vY=&refcode=em062019)

Mike Siegel

Medicaid expansion in Texas will save the lives of countless Texans, thousands of children among them. It will make pregnancy safer for mothers and their babies. It will allow kids to go to school and parents to go to work instead of losing days to preventable illnesses. It will keep rural hospitals from being bankrupted by unpaid debts. There is no good reason for the Texas government to refuse to expand Medicaid: our federal income tax dollars are already paying to expand Medicaid nationwide. We are only missing out on the benefits, not the cost. Of course, Medicaid expansion alone cannot fix everything that is wrong with America’s healthcare system. We need leaders who will make universal healthcare a reality, and who will push back against the ruthless profiteering of the corporate healthcare industry. No one should die because their insurance deductible was too high. Let’s work together to end this needless crisis. Equal access to health care means a chance at equal opportunity for every American, regardless of who your parents are, where you were born, or how much money is in your bank account. | For the name: Ed Markey
subject: too great a risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | | Hello,

President Donald Trump is desperate to open up our coastal waters to Big Oil for drilling.

An oil spill would cripple our economy and devastate our environment. I will never support irresponsible corporate fossil fuel interests over the needs of the businesses, communities, and ecosystems that make up our beautiful coastlines.

_**[Stand with me against President Trump and Big Oil. Click here to sign the petition and say NO to offshore drilling!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddd6/693b8b0a/58a8d9d1/72de8a9d/2767439006/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/say-no-to-offshore-drilling?source=062019_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

[](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddd6/693b8b0a/58a8d9d1/72de8a9d/2767439006/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/say-no-to-offshore-drilling?source=062019_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
The truth is, President Trump has no regard for our unique environment, our coastal communities, or public health.

He only cares about catering to Big Oil donors.

That's why we must make sure his plan to expand offshore drilling never happens.

_**[Sign the petition and stand against President Trump and Big Oil. Say NO to offshore drilling!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddd6/693b8b0a/58a8d9d1/72de8a9d/2767439006/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/say-no-to-offshore-drilling?source=062019_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

Thanks,

Ed

name: Brad Komar, Team Hickenlooper
subject: A critical moment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
One week from tomorrow, the country will decide which of the 20 debating candidates managed to capture the spotlight and break out from the pack. It'll be a critical moment, and we need to be ready. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717a7/691c9bd/6d81e021/11a4c4c6/189570104/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

One week from today, John will take the presidential debate stage for the first time.

One week from tomorrow, the country will decide which of the 20 debating candidates managed to capture the spotlight and break out from the pack. It'll be a critical moment, and we need to be ready.

**While John is preparing to shine on stage, we need to prepare for what will happen once he walks off.** We need the resources to take advantage of that moment and contact new voters, expand our campaign to new states, and take our momentum to the next level.

**We 've set a goal of raising $150,000 for our Miami Debate Fund before John takes the stage next Thursday night. Anyone who chips in before then will become an official Debate Donor, and we'll share your name with John before he takes the stage.** [**_Are you in?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper. name: TAKE ACTION (via Thompson HQ)
subject: Send Mitch McConnell a message
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter - This call to action is too important to miss. Mike has led the charge to pass commonsense bipartisan legislation requiring background checks on all firearm purchases, but Mitch McConnell is still standing in the way of progress.

[Sign our petition right away to demand McConnell bring Mike's bill to a vote in the Senate! ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MapnHZ0bAWoNDbxZChsjOF-7iI9UV1uM5lXfwgNrXY=/QeVzb5CH7sz0Lbq-mLA_0ajVWHGBM0NnBRMuN7RC9zM=)

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
> Peter - It's been 112 days since the House passed an historic measure requiring universal background checks on all firearm purchases. I was proud to introduce this bill, because the scourge of gun violence on our communities has gone on for too long.
>
> And even though 97% of Americans support background checks, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans still have not taken action on this pressing issue.
>
> **Americans have made it very clear that they support universal background checks.** [Will you add your name to our petition and demand McConnell bring background checks up for a vote in the Senate?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MapnHZ0bAWoNDbxZChsjOF-7iI9UV1uM5lXfwgNrXY=/QeVzb5CH7sz0Lbq-mLA_0ajVWHGBM0NnBRMuN7RC9zM=)
>
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MapnHZ0bAWoNDbxZChsjOF-7iI9UV1uM5lXfwgNrXY=/QeVzb5CH7sz0Lbq-mLA_0ajVWHGBM0NnBRMuN7RC9zM=)
> I've worked hard with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to pass this important legislation to make our communities safer from the threat of gun violence.
>
> We can't let McConnell be the roadblock on our path to the first serious action on common sense gun violence prevention by Congress in 25 years. It's our duty to do all we can to prevent gun violence.
>
> [Let's keep up the pressure on Senate Republicans to keep this legislation moving. Add your name right away!](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MapnHZ0bAWoNDbxZChsjOF-7iI9UV1uM5lXfwgNrXY=/QeVzb5CH7sz0Lbq-mLA_0ajVWHGBM0NnBRMuN7RC9zM=)
>
> Thanks for all you do,
>
> Mike
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MapnHZ0bAWoNDbxZChsjOF-7iI9UV1uM5lXfwgNrXY=/QeVzb5CH7sz0Lbq-mLA_0ajVWHGBM0NnBRMuN7RC9zM=)
> * * *
> _Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MapnHZ0bAWoNDbxZChsjOF-7iI9UV1uM5lXfwgNrXY=/DbF4RRdtQ5CQTnqZ-bXUBVyvU-tTIFMSUnh9OiPxXzc=?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_JA_90DO_190620_1_2&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_
>
> _We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MapnHZ0bAWoNDbxZChsjOF-7iI9UV1uM5lXfwgNrXY=/ID2BvmYInjMNxLS_klNOrigHh9jKLKbhWv80AjvaVks=)_

body:
|
---
Hi Team,

It's me again bumping Tim's message. I wanted to remind our dedicated group of supporters that today is the last day to enter the contest for a chance to win two tickets to Miami and the debate.

Tim, myself, and the rest of the team would love to see you there! [_**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/miami_contest**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/miami_contest?refcode=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacommiamicont&utm_campaign=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T2&source=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T2")

Fingers crossed!!
Andrea

**Begin forwarded message:**

>
>
> Team,
>
> I'm fired up and ready to debate the issues that matter to Americans: jobs, inequality, health care, pensions -- the real bread and butter issues our families and communities care about.
>
> Before that though, I want to reiterate some really exciting news: we have [_**two tickets for flights to Miami and two tickets to the debate**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-miami?refcode=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+two+tickets+for+flights+to+Miami+and+two&utm_campaign=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T2&source=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T2"). We don't want to extend the offer to just anyone, team -- that's why we are reaching out only to a select group of dedicated supporters like you.
>
> All you have to do to enter is complete this form and consider donating any amount -- even as little as $3. [_**But be sure to enter soon, because the contest closes tomorrow.**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-miami?refcode=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+But+be+sure+to+enter+soon+because+the+co&utm_campaign=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T2&source=TR_EM_CONTEST_ACT_190620_1_6_T2")
>
> You have powered my campaign and provided me with the grassroots energy and support I needed to make it to Miami -- now it's time for me to return the favor.
>
> I hope to see you there!
>
> Tim

name: Warren 2020
subject: Here's what we're not going to do...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth isn't going to fly from coast to coast to host a spree of swanky fundraising events, where you can only get in, meet her, and tell her what's on your mind if you can write a big fat check. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc721/3100230740/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
On Team Warren, we _love_ having a plan.

Elizabeth has a plan to make Washington work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

And we have a plan to make it happen: Keep growing our grassroots movement.

**The next step: Hitting our fundraising goal before the end of June.** That's the next FEC reporting deadline -- a chance for everyone to see how much we've raised and how many people have chipped in to own a piece of our movement.

**But we looked at the numbers, and we 're a little behind where we need to be. We've got to hit this goal to keep our ideas for big, structural change front and center in this race.

[We only ask when it really matters, and this is one of those moments: Will you make your first donation right now to help close the gap? $3 would make a real difference.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc720/3100230740/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNjIwZW0xLW5vLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190620em1-no-full")**

Every day, we keep an eye on whether we're still on track to hit the goals we set for major deadlines like June 30. And we'll need an increase in the next couple of days to get back on track.

But here's what we're _not_ going to do:

Elizabeth isn't going to fly from coast to coast to host a spree of swanky fundraising events, where you can only get in, meet her, and tell her what's on your mind if you can write a big fat check. She doesn't host _any_ events like that -- every supporter gets equal access.

We won't dial up deep-pocketed donors. We won't take a dime from any federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. And we won't butter up any billionaires who could make up the difference by running a Super PAC.

Instead, here's the plan: We keep building this movement side by side.

**Grassroots donors are the only people who power this campaign, and this is one of the moments when we need all hands on deck.

[Please chip in for the first time right now to help make sure we're on track to hit our goal before the end of June.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc720/3100230740/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNjIwZW0xLW5vLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190620em1-no-full")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc720/3100230740/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNjIwZW0xLW5vLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190620em1-no-full")
---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc723/3100230740/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc722/3100230740/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc725/3100230740/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc724/3100230740/VEsO/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc727/3100230740/VEsP/ "https://www.flickr.com/photos/146043801@N08/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e108/45c30650/16306002f/669bc726/3100230740/VEsHBQ/ "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: URGENT: this is your LAST chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want to meet you.
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5dc855c71ce378720adbfab18d95fdbc553cc287a829ccbb6f10968b8a3c11e2856738781e51ba55fd8502fd1cbb7922b5d6c1cb2e1d3eca)
---

Friend,

Time is running out.

I have a very important dinner coming up and I want YOU to be there with me.

This is the LAST day to contribute to win an **EXCLUSIVE, VIP ALL-ACCESS** trip to meet me in our Nation's capital, but I noticed you _still_ haven't entered.

You're one of my best supporters, Friend, and I want to offer you something extra special. _If you contribute any amount RIGHT NOW, you 'll automatically be entered TWICE to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. _
---

We'll cover your flight
We'll make sure you have a very nice place to stay
And we'll even get a picture together.**

It'll be a night neither of us forgets.

name: Zach Graumann, Yang2020
subject: DEBATE: One Week Out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | | |
---
| Friend -- We are officially one week away from the biggest night of the campaign. Yes, Yang Gang. We have kicked, and scratched, and clawed our way onto the biggest arena in American politics. We will be sharing our message with tens of millions of people, next to Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders. And it is all because of you. On my first day as campaign manager, I printed out a massive poster of the _New York Times_ quote and hung it on our wall in HQ. clean_body: | | | | | Friend -- We are officially one week away from the biggest night of the campaign. Yes, Yang Gang. We have kicked, and scratched, and clawed our way onto the biggest arena in American politics. We will be sharing our message with tens of millions of people, next to Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders. And it is all because of you. On my first day as campaign manager, I printed out a massive poster of the New York Times quote and hung it on our wall in HQ. Many of you have seen us use it as a rallying cry this year: "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang" "That's the baseline," I said to our team. "Prove them wrong." It has been one year and three months since we hung that sign. We're now out-polling sitting senators and governors, we've built a massive grassroots donor army, and we're polling in 8th place, asserting ourselves as a force to be reckoned with. We will not stop there. Which is why we need your help, one week from the debates. We are a little over 6,000 donors away from hitting the 130,000 donor requirement for the third debate. If we hit this target, we're virtually guaranteed to stick around through 2020 - the field will winnow and we'll be one of the few contenders standing. "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang" We were driving across New Hampshire the other day and the gravity of the whole thing finally hit me. On one hand, I kinda teared up - I know we are meant to be here and we have an incredible opportunity to improve the lives of millions of people. On the other hand, my killer instinct kicked in - we will not shy away from our moment. Yang is working his tail off to knock these debates out of the park. The first round of debates will be an introduction to Andrew. He is going to introduce his ideas to the world and wake America up to our rapidly changing economy. The second round of debates will be where we hit our stride - and this campaign will become an unstoppable wave that will bring our solutions crashing down on Washington in 2020. "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang" And you can bet this longer-than-longshot will make it worth every penny. Zach Graumann Campaign Manager, Yang2020 | | | Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. name: Team Beto
subject: Unprecedented
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
There’s much to do in our remaining days before this month ends, so we’ll keep this short. We need to pick up the pace on fundraising before the FEC deadline on June 30.
**We are being outraised and outspent.** There’s a crowded Democratic field, and it’s tough to raise the resources needed to compete.
**Some people are counting Beto out. They always have. And they’ve always been wrong.** When Beto’s campaign for Senate first launched, most thought he didn’t have a chance. But with your help, we built a true grassroots campaign, and with the power of all people, we spread Beto’s positive vision far and wide. And we proved everyone wrong by pulling off something unprecedented. Thanks to our work, Texas is a purple state now. If we can do that, we can do anything. Let’s prove them wrong again.
[Can Beto count on you to pitch in $3 before the FEC deadline? Together, we can send an important message about the strength of our grassroots campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17886?refcode=ema20190620-37710&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=37710%2E444211%2EW9Yw6c)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17886?refcode=ema20190620-37710&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=37710%2E444211%2EW9Yw6c)**
There’s no one in this race who can unite the majority of Americans behind a shared vision like Beto can -- a vision where everyone has the healthcare they need, where we mobilize in historic numbers to stop climate change, where immigrants are welcome, where everyone has a voice and can vote. And so much more.

**But to keep building the large, grassroots campaign required to win, we need your help,****_now_****.** We’ve got a lot of resources to raise before June 30. But if everyone reading this email pitches in even a little bit, we’d be in good shape. Together, we can do this!
[Please pitch in $3 before the FEC deadline.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17886?refcode=ema20190620-37710&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=37710%2E444211%2EW9Yw6c)
Thank you for believing in Beto. He definitely believes in you.
\-- Team Beto
**[Contribute »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17886?refcode=ema20190620-37710&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=37710%2E444211%2EW9Yw6c)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=37710%2E444211%2EW9Yw6c). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: you're not on the list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team: Last month, Roll Call said Democrats "cannot afford to lose" New Hampshire if we want to take back the Senate. To make sure we have the resources we need to win, Maggie said that I could reach out and ask you to become a founding member of this campaign.
We need to raise $8,000 by midnight tonight, and missing this goal will mean falling behind before we've even begun -- and it could mean losing New Hampshire's Democratic Senate seat and any hope of taking back the Senate. [**Please, will you give $3 or more right now to become a founding member, win in New Hampshire and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc239/2a380d31/3ec517d4/f13e4a/783121304/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjBfTVdINENKU19STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190620_MWH4CJS_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Races up here in New Hampshire are always tight. Back in 2014, I won by just 3 percentage points -- and in 2016, President Trump came within several thousand votes of flipping our state red.
And now, with CNBC calling me one of the two most endangered Democratic senators in the entire country, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are gearing up to try to defeat me in 2020. That's why I need your help.
**I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you right now. We 're nowhere near tonight's goal, and I don't see your name on the list. [Please, will you give $3 or more right now to protect New Hampshire's Democratic Senate seat and take back the Senate?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc239/2a380d31/3ec517d4/f13e4a/783121304/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjBfTVdINENKU19STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190620_MWH4CJS_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

clean_body: Team: Last month, Roll Call said Democrats "cannot afford to lose" New Hampshire if we want to take back the Senate. To make sure we have the resources we need to win, Maggie said that I could reach out and ask you to become a founding member of this campaign. We need to raise $8,000 by midnight tonight, and missing this goal will mean falling behind before we've even begun -- and it could mean losing New Hampshire's Democratic Senate seat and any hope of taking back the Senate. "" Races up here in New Hampshire are always tight. Back in 2014, I won by just 3 percentage points -- and in 2016, President Trump came within several thousand votes of flipping our state red. And now, with CNBC calling me one of the two most endangered Democratic senators in the entire country, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are gearing up to try to defeat me in 2020. That's why I need your help. I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you right now. We 're nowhere near tonight's goal, and I don't see your name on the list. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Thank you, Jeanne ""

---
Peter --

We don't mean to alarm you, but we have some bad news: **Donald Trump raised nearly $25 million on the day he launched his campaign** That's more in 1 day than any Democrat in this race has raised in 3 months.

That's a LOT of money. We don't expect to match that -- but we do need enough to compete.

**Our first PUBLIC fundraising deadline is at the end of the month.** We want to raise $500,000 from our digital fundraising program.

It's going to take a lot of work to get there, but if we do, we'll have the resources we need to compete with Trump's fortunes.

So Peter, we need your help to hit our goal. This is what we have on record for you: | | Supporter: **Peter Willis**

| Patriot,
These are dark days for anyone hoping to keep strong conservative values alive. Our President is under constant attack from the mainstream fake news media and Nancy Pelosi and the radical left will stop at NOTHING to silence conservative voices.
However, there is one voice that they cannot silence. That voice is Matt Gaetz. Amidst all of the chaos and nonsense being thrown around by the media and the radical left, Matt continues to fight. He will not be deterred by the games being played in Washington D.C. and will always speak loud and proud about strong conservative values.
As Matt continues to fight he needs your help. He needs to know that you stand shoulder to shoulder with him and that together we can defeat the radical left machine. Do you stand with Matt?

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: It's time to flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
**[Contribute $5 now to help us flip the Senate in 2020.](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Team,
Our country is facing urgent issues that require action from our leaders in Congress, but Mitch McConnell is standing in the way of the Senate making progress for the American people.
At the same time, he is confirming radical judicial nominees and keeping the GOP in lockstep with the Trump Administration's extreme agenda that is leaving Montanans behind.
Our path forward is clear: Democrats must take back the Senate in 2020. And the only way we can do that is by defeating Steve Daines next year and flipping Montana's Senate seat blue.
**[It's time to flip the Senate, team--starting right here in Montana. Are you with me? Pitch in $5, or whatever you can, right now to help us get there.](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Right now, the Senate should be addressing climate change and protecting our public lands. The Senate should be standing with working families and defending our right to health care. But we know none of this is going to happen under the watch of Steve Daines and Mitch McConnell.
That's why it's so important that Democrats reclaim the Senate majority. And because our race in Montana could mean the difference between victory or defeat, we've got to win this fight.
Montanans know it's time for Steve Daines to go. Experts are listing Montana among states within reach for Democrats. After beating a four-term incumbent in a tough race to become Helena's mayor, I've got the experience we need to win this Senate seat back for all of us.
[**If we stand together, we can flip the Senate in 2020. Contribute $5 right now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

#
The end of this month is already our most important deadline yet, but now it’s even more critical. A new poll shows Democrats **leading **in Georgia. **Yes, leading. **

In just a few days, our fundraising number goes public. **If Democrats see that we’ve missed our goal – AFTER a poll showing they’re leading in Georgia – they will be more fired up than ever to defeat President Trump and David in 2020.**

We’re launching an emergency rapid response fund to help David fight back. [**Will you be one of the first to chip in right now with an urgent donation?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d57c84ba8f&e=02cd889ad3)

We defied the political pundits and national polls in 2014, all thanks to you. We **will **defy them again in 2020, but only with your help. [**That’s why we need you to support our rapid response fund right now.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=afd678bdf6&e=02cd889ad3)

Democrats have made it clear: **Georgia is their top target. **15 Democrats running for President have already been here. Stacey Abrams and her machine are still running the show. **Democrats believe they have an even better chance of defeating President Trump and David in 2020.**

The end of this month is going to determine our momentum going forward. It’s absolutely critical we hit our goal, starting with this rapid response fund.

[**Please, give whatever you can afford right now so David can keep fighting back.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b6d8f20aab&e=02cd889ad3)

Team Perdue

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm asking you for a donation today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, There are two reasons I'm going to ask you to make a donation to this campaign today. **The FEC fundraising deadline is just days away.** The end-of-quarter report we are required to file after June will be an important opportunity for the world to see what kind of campaign we're building together. **What I hope people will see is a campaign that is thriving while living its values.** We need to show that we have the resources and grassroots backing to run a presidential campaign that can compete with Donald Trump next fall. But we also need to show we're building this the right way. We made a point from the beginning of rejecting contributions from powerful special interests -- we're not taking a dollar from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists. When we file our report, every single donation will be from someone who chipped in because they believe in building something unapologetically bold but also unwaveringly optimistic about what Americans can get done when we pull together. **The second reason I 'm asking you to chip in is a lot more symbolic.** The people who are part of the report we put out into the world mean much more to me than names and numbers. **You will always be the founders of this campaign -- the people who took a chance on me and who believed my voice should be part of this conversation.** With a field of amazing Democrats, I know making a donation to any campaign means something. And while I hope to earn the votes of everyone I can, I'm just so grateful to the folks who've believed in me and in our campaign enough to chip in to give us a fighting chance. Thank you for being part of that special group of founding donors to this campaign. **Your support means the world to me --[_if you can, please chip in again before our big FEC deadline to make sure we have a strong showing. This is just the beginning._](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190620-em?refcode=em_fr_20190620_CB_20190620-fr-CB-eoqrsnd-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for being part of it, Cory
[](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190620-em?refcode=em_fr_20190620_CB_20190620-fr-CB-eoqrsnd-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09d9/5fca0d19/77ed7bb/291b9e35/565303625/VEsF/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09d9/5fca0d19/77ed7bb/291b9e34/565303625/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09d9/5fca0d19/77ed7bb/291b9e33/565303625/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09d9/5fca0d19/77ed7bb/291b9e32/565303625/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09d9/5fca0d19/77ed7bb/291b9e31/565303625/VEsB/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09d9/5fca0d19/77ed7bb/291b9e35/565303625/VEsO/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: MCCONNELL ALERT (via Team Baer)
subject: Donald Trump just declared:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Uhhhhh what? We need your eyes on this short email ASAP:
|
---

| | We need your eyes on this short email ASAP:

President Trump just declared that he would accept help from a foreign power in 2020 to win re-election.

It's a historic threat to our democracy -- and it was enough to push Trump's closest allies to publicly condemn him.

And what did Mitch McConnell have to say?

**He said Democrats are "harassing" the President by our alarm at his threat, and purposefully fixating on it as a tactic to stall legislation.**

Uhhhhh what?

The House of Representatives just passed a bill to safeguard our elections -- legislation we want to pass!

But we won't be able to pass it without flipping the Senate.

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Roy Moore is back, and that’s not our only problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74264/images/tt2020%20email%20header.png]
Friend –
Right across the Chattahoochee River from Teresa’s home, Alabama voters are once again dealing with alleged sexual assaulter and child predator Roy Moore as a candidate for U.S. Senate – and who could possibly support someone so reprehensible? David Perdue.
David Perdue was totally behind Moore last time – the same Roy Moore who is a once-removed, once-suspended, radical ideologue of an Alabama Chief Justice who defied federal court orders, associated with neo-Confederates and white nationalists, and couldn’t stop spewing bigoted views on race, sexual orientation, gender identity, and Islam.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em062019_a&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em062019_a&noskip=true]
David Perdue is too extreme for Georgia. He has always put party before country – even when it meant supporting a credibly accused sex offender. Donate $5 right now so we can show the country what real Georgia values are about. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em062019_a&noskip=true]
You might think there’s no one as anti-choice as Roy Moore – until you consider the three bills David Perdue introduced in the U.S. Senate in a single year that would functionally outlaw and criminalize abortion.
If Democrats don’t win back the Senate the David Perdue-Roy Moore duo would have free rein to team up and create the most anti-choice legislation you can imagine.
It doesn’t stop there. Roy Moore said Civil Rights “started to create new rights in 1965, and today we’ve got a problem.” What does Perdue think about voting rights? When a Georgia voter asked him about the 53,000 unprocessed voter applications for the 2018 election, Perdue snatched the cell phone from their hand.
And it gets worse. When three women – two of whom are sexual assault survivors – asked David Perdue whether he would vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court, he physically pushed them aside and hid in a men’s bathroom. When they tried to shake his hand, he said: “Don’t touch me.”
Will you chip in $5 to Teresa’s campaign today, so that Georgia can finally have a Senator with the courage to stand up FOR us, not TO us? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em062019_a&noskip=true]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em062019_a&noskip=true]
-Team Tomlinson
<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/roy-moore-is-back-and-thats-not-our-only-problem/]
PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Contributions or gifts to Teresa Tomlinson for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Thanks for your support!

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Petition: Oppose President Trump's immigration threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[SIGN ON: Oppose President Trump's threats to cut off aid to the Northern Triangle.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c95/42ab3cf4/63df2fd2/135d6925/4083608595/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/oppose-president-trump-s-inhumane-immigration-policies?source=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
Once again, President Trump is pushing his dangerous, anti-immigrant agenda--this time, threatening to cut off aid to three Central American countries: El Salvador, Guatemala, and Honduras.
If the Administration follows through on these threats, the results will prove to be both cruel and ineffective, with even more families seeking asylum at our southern border.
**[Peter, we all need to take a stand to oppose President Trump's inhumane immigration policies. Add your name right now if you're with me in this fight.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c95/42ab3cf4/63df2fd2/135d6925/4083608595/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/oppose-president-trump-s-inhumane-immigration-policies?source=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
President Trump claims that his threats to cut off foreign aid are because of the number of refugees coming to our border from the Northern Triangle. But making life harder for people struggling to survive in El Salvador, Guatemala, and Honduras will only exacerbate the crisis.
And to make matters worse, this threat comes on the heels of the President's sinister promise of mass arrests and deportations of undocumented immigrants in the United States.
Once again, the Trump Administration is doubling down on its anti-immigrant policies that are not only inhumane, but don't address the root causes of the crisis we're trying to solve.
In the Senate, you can count on me to keep standing up to the President's misguided approach to immigration and fighting to pass comprehensive immigration reform. Are you with me?
**[Sign on now to stand with me and reject President Trump's cruel, anti-immigrant agenda.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c95/42ab3cf4/63df2fd2/135d6925/4083608595/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/oppose-president-trump-s-inhumane-immigration-policies?source=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c95/42ab3cf4/63df2fd2/135d6925/4083608595/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/oppose-president-trump-s-inhumane-immigration-policies?source=em190620&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c95/42ab3cf4/63df2fd2/135d6926/4083608595/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c95/42ab3cf4/63df2fd2/135d6927/4083608595/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Team Joe
subject: don't watch the debate alone, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We know you don't want to watch it alone -- it would be so much more fun if you hosted a watch party for your friends, family, and neighbors! | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194b4/1cd0ac28/1057e2ad/356cffb5/2613396205/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter,

Joe Biden takes the debate stage in only 7 days. It's going to be an exciting night!

We _know_ you don't want to watch it alone -- it would be so much more fun if you hosted a watch party for your friends, family, and neighbors!

**So don 't wait. Click the button below to create your event:** | | [**HOST A WATCH PARTY »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194b4/1cd0ac28/1057e2ad/356cffb4/2613396205/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/Host-Debate-Party?source=email-bsd-20190620debatehost-b2_EVT_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190620debatehost&utm_content=b2_EVT_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")
---
Wonder why we're hoping to set up as many watch parties as possible? It's simple: this is a great opportunity to connect Joe Biden supporters and volunteers all across the country. That's why we need you to sign up and host a party in Cresco.

These watch parties can be as big or small as you'd like. In fact, you can even make them private events.

We'll provide you with all the information you need -- including a watch party toolkit with step-by-step instructions.

**So what do you say, Peter?!? Can we count on you to host a watch party? Click the button below to get started:**
| [**HOST A WATCH PARTY »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194b4/1cd0ac28/1057e2ad/356cffb4/2613396205/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/Host-Debate-Party?source=email-bsd-20190620debatehost-b2_EVT_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190620debatehost&utm_content=b2_EVT_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")
---
Thanks for your help,
Team Joe
|

body:
One week from tomorrow, the country will decide which of the 20 debating candidates managed to capture the spotlight and break out from the pack. It'll be a critical moment, and we need to be ready. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717b8/691c9bd/6d879363/11a4c54d/634539600/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| Friend,

One week from today, John will take the presidential debate stage for the first time.

One week from tomorrow, the country will decide which of the 20 debating candidates managed to capture the spotlight and break out from the pack. It'll be a critical moment, and we need to be ready.

**While John is preparing to shine on stage, we need to prepare for what will happen once he walks off.** We need the resources to take advantage of that moment and contact new voters, expand our campaign to new states, and take our momentum to the next level.

**We 've set a goal of raising $150,000 for our Miami Debate Fund before John takes the stage next Thursday night. Anyone who chips in before then will become an official Debate Donor, and we'll share your name with John before he takes the stage.** [**_Are you in?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper. While John is preparing to shine on stage, we need to prepare for what will happen once he walks off. We need the resources to take advantage of that moment and contact new voters, expand our campaign to new states, and take our momentum to the next level. We 've set a goal of raising $150,000 for our Miami Debate Fund before John takes the stage next Thursday night. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The only way to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
When we launched our first grassroots campaign nearly two years ago, I made it a priority to meet and engage with as many constituents as possible.
| | Dear Peter,

When we launched our first grassroots campaign nearly two years ago, I made it a priority to meet and engage with as many constituents as possible. I spoke with thousands of individuals in virtually every corner of the 7th, not because I wanted to get elected, but because _when_ I got elected, I wanted to know exactly how best to serve them in Congress.

Not only did we earn the confidence of the voters, we also broke virtually every fundraising record in district history--all without taking a penny from corporate PACs. As far as I'm concerned, this is the only way to win.

I'm committed to keeping this people-centric approach toward building our re-election effort, just as I'm committed to fulfilling my promise of accountability and accessibility to my constituents. [**Can I count on you to join us, Peter?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/ll3EL0HiXCnjWRwUaZo43U3CihIf7nsaXTdDgivYfkc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.20_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) **[Click here to be a grassroots contributor to Team Spanberger 2020. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/OA-daEL7WzDXt1dYfYDf8EFHiI9wHxBrroeX0kPi2pE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.20_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)** | ********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/OA-daEL7WzDXt1dYfYDf8EFHiI9wHxBrroeX0kPi2pE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.20_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)********
---
They said it would be impossible to win this seat, but they weren't counting on thousands of us coming together in the fight to restore our democracy. We're going to need to fight even harder to win again in 2020, but I can think of few causes more worthy of our time and energy.

I would love to know we have you on our side, Peter. [**Please consider making an early donation**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/ll3EL0HiXCnjWRwUaZo43U3CihIf7nsaXTdDgivYfkc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.20_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) to ensure we're at fighting strength in the coming months.

Thank you, as always.

_\- Abigail_
********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/OA-daEL7WzDXt1dYfYDf8EFHiI9wHxBrroeX0kPi2pE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.20_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)********
---
** **

** **
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/z0S8mh9WfnOomPBqLhI--Ar8gm3yko3rYBC0MdVoZtk=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/r9joRaDL11IIEPHURkwWYXJxOUWlV30tXmrtW7S2-aI=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTRoCl4S4Z4v9K_zSPXRE_agBKhQY-AUtBXeJl7r2-w=/jl7Pr3PIWaOkrNOBxgK8hNCvCnWvN79W02JPoX_Avbo=).

name: Tim
subject: A Hard Day's Work Needs A Real Wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Autoworkers watch their jobs go overseas. Teachers strike for fair wages and better work places. Hardworking people in the USA fight, day in and day out, for the same thing. They want to earn a wage they can live on for a day's work.

Factories have closed. Wages aren't growing. The cost of healthcare is on the rise. And the American Dream is out of reach for way too many.

[_**My plan is to move our economy forward. I need your help to spread the vision of my plan. Over the airwaves and on the ground. Will you chip in to help me spread the word?**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+My+plan+is+to+move+our+economy+forward+I&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2") _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will immediately process your contribution to Tim Ryan for America when you click a button below. Otherwise, you will be directed to a donation page._ | [$3](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+ask&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2") | [$25](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+ask&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2") | [Other](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Other&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2")
---|---|---
The working class is the core of the USA. But today, too many working families go to bed thinking, how am I going to pay the bills?

**It 's time for government to bring in new ideas. It's time for entrepreneurship again. I'm confident we can build an economy that leads to investment, innovation, and new growth. _[But I need your help to get this message out there. Can I count on you to help me? Chip in $3 now.](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+But+I+need+your+help+to+get+this+message&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2")_**

Together we can build an economy that works for you, me and the guy or girl next door. Where workers are cut in on the deal. Where they actually benefit from the economic gains they help create.

Thanks for your support,

Tim

|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9f06/5486deaa/21bbcda7/dc9c1c9/4239581461/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2")

**We know email can be overwhelming,**
so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list [here](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9f06/5486deaa/21bbcda7/dc9c1c8/4239581461/VEsB/ "https://timryan.cp.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2"), or unsubscribe from all email by [ clicking here.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9f06/5486deaa/21bbcda7/dc9c1cb/4239581461/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiIyMWJiY2RhNyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6ImQ3YTlmMDYifQ==/ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/21bbcda7/d7a9f06?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-++clicking+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190620_3_2_T2")
