name: Andy Beshear
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
It's now been thirty days since this team won Kentucky's Democratic primary, and I have good news and bad news. The good news is that we've had an incredible response from Democrats all over the comm
|
---
[ ](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db41885/3304583497/VEsH/ "https://andybeshear.com/")

| | | **Help us hit our One-Day Goal of 150 supporters!
[Pitch in before midnight >>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db4189a/3304583497/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=5")**
---
Peter,

It's now been thirty days since this team won Kentucky's Democratic primary, and I have good news and bad news.

The good news is that we've had an incredible response from Democrats all over the Commonwealth. Our party is unified and committed to bringing positive change to Frankfort this November.

The bad news is that Matt Bevin and his friends have wasted no time in attacking Jacqueline and me. They launched their misleading attack ads the day after the primary, and now the billionaire Koch brothers are on board and backing Bevin.

**We 're facing an avalanche of out-of-state, special interest money, Peter. But I'm confident we can overcome it if Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth stand together to support this campaign. The 30-day post-primary deadline is coming up tonight, and my finance team tells me we need 150 supporters to pitch in to keep us on track, so I'm announcing a One-Day Goal to help us get there. Will you make your first-ever donation before midnight?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db4189b/3304583497/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?express_lane=true&refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db41898/3304583497/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?express_lane=true&refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db41899/3304583497/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?express_lane=true&refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db4189e/3304583497/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?express_lane=true&refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db4189f/3304583497/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?express_lane=true&refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db4189c/3304583497/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?refcode=20190620.1nd__134__")**
What's tonight's deadline about? Kentucky's Registry of Election Finance requires campaigns to make their fundraising totals public 30 days after the primary. This is our first official deadline of the general election -- which means everyone, both allies and opponents, will be looking at our numbers to gauge the strength of our campaign.

It's incredibly important that our totals reflect the momentum I know we have on the ground. Jacqueline and I have met supporters and volunteers in every part of the state, and we're building a robust grassroots movement -- now we just have to show what we're made of.

**I could really use your help, Peter. This is our most important deadline yet.[Will you pitch in to help us hit our One-Day Goal of 150 supporters?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db4189a/3304583497/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=5")**

Thank you,
Andy

| **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b60/ad6dc73/150d3a79/db4189a/3304583497/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oneday?refcode=20190620.1nd__134__&amount=5")**

We may accept contributions from an individual totaling up to $2,000 per election cycle (the May Primary and November General are considered separate elections). State law prohibits contributions from corporations; from any person contributing another person's funds; from foreign nationals who lack permanent resident status; and from state government contractors. By contributing, you affirm that your contribution is from your personal funds and not from funds otherwise prohibited by law. To comply with state law, we must use best efforts to obtain, maintain, and submit the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals and their spouses, when personal contributions exceed $100 per election cycle. Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019. Lindy Karns, Treasurer._

To comply with state law, we must use best efforts to obtain, maintain, and submit the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals and their spouses, when personal contributions exceed $100 per election cycle. Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019. Lindy Karns, Treasurer._

body:
Hi -- Jeanne Shaheen reached out earlier today because if her fundraising falls behind, it could mean that we lose all hope of taking back the Senate.
In fact, **Roll Call says that Democrats "cannot afford to lose" New Hampshire if we want to take back the majority.**
We're still short of the $8,000 we told Jeanne we'd help her campaign raise today. [**$3 from you -- right this very minute -- would be enormously helpful in closing the gap. subject: RE: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
Will you take my emergency Mueller Poll to help me ensure Mueller can testify before Congress? I need 10,000 responses before midnight. >>
---
| | **ADAM SCHIFF: 'TIME IS RUNNING OUT' FOR MUELLER TO TESTIFY** | I NEED 10,000 MUELLER RESPONSES Quickly -- Robert Mueller just signaled he's willing to testify before Congress,__ but Trump is working to block him --_and we're almost out of time._

**I need a MASSIVE surge of support before midnight. Do you want to hear Mueller 's testimony?**

[**YES! >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b53c/18e32a7f/58cf02d5/7ba8b943/914893080/VEsH/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190620_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all_rs")** **[No](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b53c/18e32a7f/58cf02d5/7ba8b943/914893080/VEsE/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190620_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all_rs")****
---

This is the most important ask I've ever made of you.

Robert Mueller just signaled he's willing to testify before Congress. We could finally get the TRUTH about his findings.

**But Trump 's rapidly working to block Mueller's testimony -- _under no circumstances can we let him succeed. _**

I need a swift and MASSIVE surge of support before midnight to prove that Americans DEMAND to hear what Mueller has to say.

[_**We're almost out of time. Will you take my emergency Mueller Poll to help me ensure Mueller can testify before Congress? I need 10,000 responses before midnight. >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b53c/18e32a7f/58cf02d5/7ba8b943/914893080/VEsF/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190620_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all_rs")

Thank you,

Ben Ray Lujan

|

name: Tina Smith
subject: Our lives depend on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Are you with me?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-pet-june?refcode=rtw_20190620_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend -- the war on our reproductive rights has reached an incredibly dangerous point.

In states across the country, GOP-controlled legislatures have passed bans on nearly all abortions -- in some cases making it a felony for doctors to provide abortion care. This is on top of consistent threats to defund Planned Parenthood at every level of government and restrict access to birth control.

And just hours ago, a federal court ruled the Trump administration's gag rule can take effect -- threatening millions of people's access to essential reproductive health services and attacking providers like Planned Parenthood.

With Trump's ultra-conservative Supreme Court justices ready to turn back the clock on our freedoms, we could be up against the most significant rollback of reproductive rights in decades.

**[That's why today, I'm joining fellow Democratic senators, representatives, and organizations to demand Congress pass legislation to protect reproductive freedoms. I need 1,000 progressives ready to fight for reproductive rights to sign on by midnight tonight. Are you with me?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fc0d/c1f7015/62f52a63/114743d8/2761728618/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=smith-email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftsm-email-june%3Frefcode%3Drtw_20190620_em%26recurring%3Dauto?source=rtw_20190620_em")**

Make no mistake: These anti-choice bills in states like Georgia, Mississippi, Ohio, and Iowa are part of a coordinated attack by the GOP that could culminate at the Supreme Court.

**If we 're going to protect reproductive freedom and ensure _Roe v. Wade_ remains the law of the land, we're going to need everyone speaking out together to demand Congress pass legislation immediately.**

**[We need to fight like our lives depend on it -- because they do. Add your name right now to call on Congress to pass legislation to protect reproductive freedoms.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fc0d/c1f7015/62f52a63/114743d8/2761728618/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=smith-email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftsm-email-june%3Frefcode%3Drtw_20190620_em%26recurring%3Dauto?source=rtw_20190620_em")**

Fighting with you,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-pet-june?refcode=rtw_20190620_em-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fc0d/c1f7015/62f52a63/114743da/2761728618/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Michael Bennet
subject: Today, I'm introducing the most comprehensive plan to fix our broken politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Hey team, I need to level with you.

Unless we fix our broken politics, we will keep struggling to make progress on any of the issues we care about - from climate change to health care to gun violence.

[That is why today, I am introducing the most comprehensive plan to fix our broken politics of any candidate in the race. My plan focuses on driving the money and special interests out of our democracy, and bringing the voters back in by dismantling pay-to-play politics, closing the revolving congressional lobbyist door, restoring voting rights, and protecting our elections.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba208/134673f2/1bc4a2c/6996dcd2/3551329717/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Clean-Up-Corruption?source=EM_FR_B2_062019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

As President, I will make it a top priority to pass comprehensive reforms to restore government to the American people. [Add your name here if you agree we need to clean up corruption and strengthen our democracy.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba208/134673f2/1bc4a2c/6996dcd2/3551329717/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Clean-Up-Corruption?source=EM_FR_B2_062019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[My plan focuses on getting money out and bringing people in. It will:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba208/134673f2/1bc4a2c/6996dcd2/3551329717/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Clean-Up-Corruption?source=EM_FR_B2_062019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---
* Enact automatic voter registration, same-day voter registration, expanded early voting, and make Election Day a national holiday.

* Support ranked choice voting to reduce partisanship and increase choice.

* Overturn Citizens United with a Constitutional amendment.

* Protect the U.S. Census by removing any question about citizenship status.

* Ban members of Congress from ever becoming lobbyists or representing foreign governments or foreign political parties.

* Cap large contributions to political parties. Currently a single donor can give more than $2.5 million to state and national political parties, over 30 times the previous limit. We should revert back to that limit.

* Require the president, vice president, and candidates for both offices to release 10 years of tax returns and disclose and divest any potential financial conflicts of interest.

We shouldn't just be the world's oldest democracy. We should be the _strongest_ , too. [Add your name here if you agree.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba208/134673f2/1bc4a2c/6996dcd2/3551329717/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Clean-Up-Corruption?source=EM_FR_B2_062019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

---
| Ninety percent of Americans support universal background checks for gun purchases. Eighty percent want a tough but fair pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants. Seventy percent are worried about climate change. The list goes on. But because of our broken politics, Washington is doing nothing. It's time to fix that.

[Take a moment to read more about my plan here:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba208/134673f2/1bc4a2c/6996dcd1/3551329717/VEsD/ "https://michaelbennet.com/politicalreform/")
---
| [READ THE PLAN ->](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba208/134673f2/1bc4a2c/6996dcd1/3551329717/VEsA/ "https://michaelbennet.com/politicalreform/")
---
I appreciate your time,

Michael

[DONATE ->](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba208/134673f2/1bc4a2c/6996dcd0/3551329717/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_062019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Debbie (personal)
subject: they honestly don't care
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | Let's face it, House Republicans not only don't care about making progress for the American people, they are determined to obstruct. In fact, the only thing they care about is taking back the House in 2020. That's why they're ramping up their fundraising earlier than ever, and it's why we have to do the same. We're still $592 short of where we need to be at midnight to stay on track ahead of the FEC deadline - can you help us close this gap?

[https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/june-2019](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-june19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190620_2_4&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomjune&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190620_2_4&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190620_2_4")

Thanks - talk soon.

Debbie
